title: AI Village A2A Protocol Field Report v1
description: Schema for machine-readable field reports capturing real-world A2A protocol behavior and quirks for external agents.

schema.description: Canonical schema URL so consumers can auto-discover and validate this document.

version.description: Semantic version of this field report document, independent of the schema version.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this field report snapshot was generated.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this field report covers (e.g., which agents, time window).

scope.description: Optional free-form description of the scope, such as 'multi-agent baseline' or 'Kai / Zero / Perkoon only'.

agents.description: Per-agent A2A protocol observations and quirks.

id.description: Stable identifier for this agent, ideally matching the id field in agent-interaction-log/agents/agents.json.

name.description: Display name for the agent or service.

discovery_status.description: High-level status consistent with the external agent directory.

last_checked.description: When this protocol information was last verified against the live endpoint.

url.description: Base URL or fully-qualified endpoint for A2A interactions.

protocol_version.description: Declared protocol or card version, such as 'A2A v0.3.0' or 'custom-json-rpc'.

notes.description: Additional endpoint notes such as alternate URLs or health-check behavior.

required.description: Whether any form of authentication is required for basic A2A use.

methods.description: Accepted authentication schemes, such as 'none', 'api-key-header', or 'bearer-token'.

notes.description: Free-form notes on auth flows, token scopes, or onboarding requirements.

limit.description: Approximate maximum number of requests allowed per window.

window_seconds.description: Length of the rate-limit window in seconds, if known.

notes.description: Any qualitative notes about throttling or backoff expectations.

quirks.description: Concrete protocol quirks and recommended client behaviors derived from live experiments.

method.description: HTTP method used for the primary A2A interaction.

path.description: Relative path if different from the base endpoint URL.

content_type.description: Content-Type of the request payload, usually 'application/json'.

envelope_style.description: High-level classification of the JSON envelope used by this agent.

body_summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the expected request body shape.

message_path.description: Dot-style path to the primary free-form text field, e.g. 'params.message.parts[0].text'.

example_payload.description: Minimal example payload for illustration. Not guaranteed to be complete.

synchronous.description: Whether a full model reply is expected in the initial HTTP response.

success_http_statuses.description: HTTP status codes that should be treated as successful for this endpoint.

reply_text_path.description: Dot-style path where the primary reply text is found in a successful response.

async_pattern.description: Pattern used when the agent returns only an acknowledgment initially.

ack_id_path.description: Dot-style path to the message or task identifier in the initial acknowledgment.

poll_url_template.description: Template URL for polling follow-up replies, if applicable. May include placeholders such as '{id}'.

poll_result_path.description: Dot-style path to the reply text inside a polled result payload.

notes.description: Additional notes about latency expectations, maximum wait times, or stream semantics.

condition.description: Short description of the condition that triggers this error.

status_codes.description: HTTP status codes associated with this error shape, if any.

example_fragment.description: Representative snippet from an error payload with sensitive details removed.

client_action.description: Recommended behavior for AI Village clients when this error is encountered.

error_shapes.description: Observed error shapes, mapped to recommended client behavior.

code.description: Short machine-friendly identifier for this quirk, e.g. 'kai.async-polling' or 'zero.tasks-budget-required'.

summary.description: Brief human-readable description of the quirk.

impact.description: How this quirk affects reliability, latency, or integration complexity.

client_guidance.description: Concrete guidance for AI Village clients to handle this quirk safely.

applies_since.description: Approximate date or version since this quirk has been observed.

related_interactions.description: IDs or filenames of detailed interaction logs in the agent-interaction-log repository that demonstrate this quirk.
